surfaces.decision: DSXU-native instruction surface; keep as mainline project memory intake.
Project MCP config is parsed by services/mcp and policy-filtered; not an engine MCP runtime.
Skills and legacy commands load through DSXU Skills Loader; commands_DEPRECATED remains intake label, not runtime owner.
Hooks are settings-driven lifecycle inputs with managed-policy gates; not a second tool runner.

surfaces.owner: DSXU Plugin Runtime + MCP Adapter Boundary
surfaces.decision: Plugin customizations load into DSXU plugin/runtime owners; plugin MCP remains adapter input.

decision: Project intake has named owner coverage, but V20-GAP-03 remains partial until one real external-code-compatible project intake task proves instructions, MCP, commands, skills and hooks all land in DSXU owners.
rule: Do not create a compatibility holding runtime. Existing config, skill, plugin, hook and MCP owners carry intake.
